not_a_verdict: GitHub Models sanctioned-path probe. SUBMITTED for independent verification.
auth: GITHUB_TOKEN + models:read (no separate secret; no value printed)
org_policy_note: In gel-ci (no models:read granted), the GITHUB_TOKEN cannot call Models -> router falls back to deterministic (now fixed). The product workflow software-repair-run-v1 declares permissions: models: read so the model path is live there.
founder_model_enablement_action: none required for the deterministic pilot; to use GitHub Models in the product workflow, ensure org GitHub Models policy allows Actions tokens (models: read) — no paid provider key needed.
